name: Banana Corn Bread Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the sifted bread flour, stone ground cornmeal, salt, and brown sugar.
3. Add the butter pieces and milk to the dry ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Stir in the active dry yeast and mashed banana until well incorporated.
5. Transfer the dough to a lightly greased loaf pan and shape into a loaf.
6. Place the loaf pan in the oven and bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
Yield: Makes 1 1/2 pound loaf
